allow: Bash(mysql -u root carelink -N -e "SELECT user_id, email, status FROM users WHERE user_type='peso' LIMIT 5;")

Bash(php -r '$c=@mysqli_connect\("127.0.0.1","root","","carelink",3306\); if\(!$c\){echo "NO DB: ".mysqli_connect_error\(\);exit;} $r=$c->query\("SELECT user_id,email,status FROM users WHERE user_type=\\"peso\\" LIMIT 5"\); while\($x=$r->fetch_assoc\(\)\) echo $x["user_id"]." | ".$x["email"]." | ".$x["status"]."\\n";')

Bash(php -r '$c=mysqli_connect\("127.0.0.1","root","","carelink",3306\); foreach\(["job_posts","placements","complaints"] as $t\){ $r=$c->query\("SHOW COLUMNS FROM $t LIKE \\"%_at\\""\); $cols=[]; while\($x=$r->fetch_assoc\(\)\)$cols[]=$x["Field"]; echo "$t: ".implode\(", ",$cols\)."\\n"; }')

Bash(php -r '$c=mysqli_connect\("127.0.0.1","root","","carelink",3306\); $r=$c->query\("SHOW TABLES LIKE \\"ref_%\\""\); $t=[]; while\($x=$r->fetch_row\(\)\)$t[]=$x[0]; foreach\($t as $tb\){ $n=$c->query\("SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM $tb"\)->fetch_assoc\(\)["c"]; echo "$tb: $n rows\\n"; }')

Bash(awk '/INSERT INTO `ref_categories`/{f="cat"} /INSERT INTO `ref_jobs`/{f="job"} /INSERT INTO `ref_skills`/{f="skill"} /INSERT INTO `ref_languages`/{f="lang"} /^\\\(/{c[f]++} END{for\(k in c\)print k, c[k]}' backend/database/ref_seed.sql)

Bash(php -r '$c=mysqli_connect\("127.0.0.1","root","","carelink",3306\); foreach\(["contracts","job_applications"] as $t\){ $r=$c->query\("SHOW COLUMNS FROM $t LIKE \\"%sign%\\""\); $f=[]; while\($x=$r->fetch_assoc\(\)\)$f[]=$x["Field"]; echo "$t: ".implode\(", ",$f\)."\\n"; }')

Bash(php -r '$c=mysqli_connect\("127.0.0.1","root","","carelink",3306\); $r=$c->query\("SELECT ja.application_id, ja.status, ja.employer_signed_at, ja.helper_signed_at, ct.contract_id FROM job_applications ja LEFT JOIN contracts ct ON ct.application_id=ja.application_id JOIN users h ON h.user_id=ja.helper_id WHERE h.first_name LIKE \\"John Paul%\\""\); while\($x=$r->fetch_assoc\(\)\) print_r\($x\);')

Bash(php -r '$c=mysqli_connect\("127.0.0.1","root","","carelink",3306\); $r=$c->query\("SELECT ja.application_id, ja.status, ja.termination_notice_date, ja.termination_last_day, ct.employment_start_date, ct.employment_end_date, CURDATE\(\) AS today FROM job_applications ja LEFT JOIN contracts ct ON ct.application_id=ja.application_id WHERE ja.application_id=11"\); print_r\($r->fetch_assoc\(\)\);')

Bash(php -r '$c=mysqli_connect\("127.0.0.1","root","","carelink",3306\); $r=$c->query\("SELECT ja.helper_id FROM job_applications ja WHERE ja.application_id=11"\); $hid=$r->fetch_assoc\(\)["helper_id"]; echo "helper_id=$hid\\n";')
